title: Evaluation Monitor Summary
description: Aggregated monitoring summary across multiple evaluation_monitor_records. Produced by the BS Continuous Evaluation Monitor after ingesting a batch of regression run results.

summary_id.description: Unique identifier for this monitoring summary.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this summary was created.

window.description: Time window covered by this summary.

start_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the earliest record in this window.

end_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the latest record in this window.

total_runs.description: Total number of monitor records aggregated.

aggregates.description: Aggregate metrics computed across all records in the window.

average_pass_rate.description: Mean pass_rate across all monitor records.

average_drift_rate.description: Mean drift_rate across all monitor records.

average_reproducibility_score.description: Mean average_reproducibility_score across all monitor records.

average_replay_consistency_sli.description: Mean replay_consistency_sli across records that include replay data.

trend_analysis.description: Trend direction for key SLI metrics across the window.

pass_rate_trend.description: Trend direction for regression pass rate over the window.

drift_rate_trend.description: Trend direction for drift rate over the window.

reproducibility_trend.description: Trend direction for average reproducibility score over the window.

replay_consistency_trend.description: Trend direction for replay_consistency_sli over the window. Only present when replay data is available.

burn_rate_assessment.description: Error-budget burn-rate assessment for the window.

status.description: Burn-rate status: normal, elevated, or exhausting.

reasons.description: Human-readable reasons for this burn-rate status.

recommended_action.description: Recommended action given the current monitoring state.

source_run_ids.description: List of source regression run IDs covered by this summary.
